# .vscode/

| File | What it configures |
|---|---|
| `settings.json` | schema validation for `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`, Live Preview default (`/docs/index.html`, port 3000), Copilot instruction-files, markdown hygiene, `ds/_ds_bundle.js` read-only |
| `tasks.json` | `claude plugin validate .` (default test task) · serve docs preview · list installed plugins |
| `launch.json` | launch a static server for the repo + open the docs page in a browser |
| `extensions.json` | Claude Code, Copilot (+Chat), Live Preview, markdownlint, YAML, GitHub Actions, EditorConfig |
